name: Western Union
description_short: Albuquerque, NM's Western Union at 3500 Coors Blvd SW provides money transfer, check cashing, and bill payment services.
description_long:
Located at 3500 Coors Blvd SW in Albuquerque, this Western Union operates as a standalone financial services location with extended hours. Open Monday through Wednesday 10AM–6PM, Thursday and Friday 9AM–6PM, Saturday 10AM–6PM, and Sunday 12PM–4PM, the branch serves the local community with money transfer and check cashing services.

This Albuquerque, NM location provides domestic and international money transfers, bill payment options, and check cashing for local residents and travelers. Call +1 800-903-7490 to confirm current services or ask about specific transfer options available at this branch.

For Albuquerque residents needing to send money or cash checks, this Coors Boulevard location offers convenient weekend and weekday access. Bring a valid ID and information about your recipient or check details; staff can assist with the transaction process and answer questions about service fees.
pros: Massive agent network with 150+ visible locations across Colorado and nationwide partnerships with Walmart, Safeway, City Market, and Kroger
24/7 online transaction initiation through WU.com, with in-store completion at agent locations
Multi-language support including English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Multiple service options including money transfer, bill payment, mobile top-up, money orders, and prepaid cards
Real-time transfer tracking capability for customers to monitor their transactions
Flexible delivery methods and Western Union Rewards program for frequent users
Established global brand with decades of trust in money transfer and payment services
cons: Service availability limited by agent location hours (typically 8 PM to 11:59 PM closing times), with some locations offering limited services only (e.g., money orders only)
Fees for money transfer services are not transparent on the website and vary by transaction type and destination
Does not offer traditional banking services like deposit accounts, savings, or credit products
Technical issues apparent on website (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable, 404 errors on secondary pages)
Dependent on third-party retail partners for physical presence, limiting control over service consistency and availability
best_for: Customers needing to send money domestically or internationally quickly through an established, widely-recognized service
Unbanked or underbanked individuals who prefer in-person cash pickup over bank transfers
Non-English speakers in areas with Western Union agent locations, given multi-language support
People making frequent international remittances or money transfers who can benefit from Western Union Rewards
diagnosis: Western Union is best for customers needing fast, accessible money transfer and cash services through a trusted global brand with extensive retail partnerships. The primary caveat is that this is a transaction-based service rather than a banking relationship—it does not provide accounts, credit, or deposit services, and actual fees and exchange rates are not visible until transaction initiation.
meta_description: Albuquerque, NM: Western Union at 3500 Coors Blvd SW. Check cashing and money transfers available.
